channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Police Investigate Deaths of Three Young Women Found in Brighton Sea
item.description: Police in Brighton are investigating the deaths of three young women whose bodies were discovered in the sea near Madeira Drive. Officers were alerted early on Wednesday morning following concerns for...

item.title: How the Milk Carton Campaign Raised Awareness for Missing Children in 1980s America
item.description: During the 1980s, the United States launched a distinctive public awareness initiative known as the Missing Children Milk Carton Campaign. This program printed photos and basic information of missing ...

item.title: RSS Leader and Former Indian Army Chief Advocate Continued Dialogue with Pakistan
item.description: A senior leader of the Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh (RSS), Dattatreya Hosabale, along with former Indian Army Chief Manoj Mukund Naravane, have publicly expressed support for keeping diplomatic channel...

item.title: The Popularity of Roman Sandals in 1960s and 1970s Fashion
item.description: Roman sandals, also known as gladiator sandals, became a defining fashion trend during the late 1960s and early 1970s. Characterized by multiple thin leather straps that wrapped around the foot, ankle...

item.title: Exploring the Mesmerizing Kinetic Typography by Syddharth Mate
item.description: Syddharth Mate, a talented designer, contributes to the ongoing 36 Days of Type project with his captivating kinetic typography series. His work stands out for its innovative use of negative space and...

item.title: Marco Rubio Wears Casual Outfit Resembling Nicolás Maduro During Travel to China
item.description: On May 12, 2026, Secretary of State Marco Rubio was photographed wearing a gray Nike tracksuit while traveling to China on Air Force One. The outfit resembled the attire former Venezuelan President Ni...

item.title: Trump Administration Criticizes Judge After Failing to Disclose Important Immigration Case Details
item.description: The Trump administration is escalating its conflict with a federal judge in Rhode Island, despite being responsible for a procedural oversight in an immigration case. Judge Melissa R. DuBose had prepa...

item.title: Africa-France Summit 2026 Commits to Stronger Agriculture and Health Partnerships
item.description: During the Africa Forward Summit held in Nairobi, African and French leaders adopted a declaration that sets out strong commitments to transform agriculture and health systems across the continent. Th...

item.title: South Africa Gains from China's Temporary Zero-Tariff Scheme for African Exports
item.description: The South African Minister of Trade, Industry and Competition, Parks Tau, has welcomed China's announcement of a temporary zero-tariff preference scheme for 20 African countries, including South Afric...

item.title: The 1938 Peugeot 402 Darl’mat Special Coupe: A Pre-War French Automotive Masterpiece
item.description: The 1938 Peugeot 402 Darl’mat Special Coupe represents an iconic blend of Art Deco elegance and aerodynamic design, marking a pinnacle of pre-war French automotive craftsmanship. Developed through the...

item.title: US Vice President JD Vance Recognises Rising Inflation and Its Economic Impact
item.description: For one rare moment wey dem dey break from the usual Trump administration happy talk, US Vice President JD Vance admit say consumer inflation no too dey okay for April. Inflation for the US reach 3.8 ...

item.title: Chevron Seeks Texas Tax Incentives for Gas Plant Supplying Data Centers
item.description: Chevron subsidiary Energy Forge One is requesting a significant tax abatement in Texas to build a natural gas power plant dedicated to powering a data center, potentially for Microsoft. The applicatio...

item.title: JAMB introduces BYOD system for UTME starting 2027 with anti-cheating measures
item.description: JAMB don announce say from 2027, dem go allow students carry their own personal computers when dem dey write UTME. Dis new system, wey dem call 'Bring Your Own Device' initiative, na one of the bigges...

item.description: A recent opinion piece by former Labor Secretary Robert Reich proposed a hypothetical scenario in which Vice President J.D. Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio would collaborate to remove Preside...

item.title: Filipino celebrities express concern over recent Senate controversy
item.description: Several Filipino celebrities have expressed their disappointment and concern over the recent events in the Philippine Senate, describing the incidents as embarrassing on the international stage. While...

item.title: Trump reportedly targets centrist Democrat Fetterman to maintain Senate majority
item.description: According to a report from The New Republic, former President Donald Trump has allegedly instructed Republican lawmakers to attempt persuading Democratic Senator John Fetterman of Pennsylvania to swit...

item.title: Trump and Xi Meet in Beijing to Discuss Trade and Middle East Tensions
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump arrived in Beijing for a highly anticipated summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping, marking the first U.S. presidential visit to China since 2017. The two leaders are set...

item.title: Microsoft Introduces Automatic Driver Rollbacks in Windows Update
item.description: Microsoft is introducing a new feature for Windows Update called Cloud-Initiated Driver Recovery, designed to automatically revert faulty drivers to a previously verified version. Currently, when a pr...

item.title: United States Repatriates Over 450 Historical Artefacts to Pakistan
item.description: ISLAMABAD – In a notable move strengthening cultural cooperation, the United States repatriated more than 450 valuable cultural artefacts to Pakistan in a ceremony at the Islamabad Museum on Wednesday...

item.title: Iran strengthens control over Strait of Hormuz amid tensions with UAE and Israel
item.description: Iran has escalated tensions in the Gulf region by threatening the UAE over alleged 'collusion' with Israel following Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's claims of a secret visit to the Emirate...
